best_prompt: Analyze the boolean expression provided and determine its truth value. Use proper logical evaluation rules and pay attention to operator precedence. Your answer must be concise and precise: either 'True' or 'False' with no additional information.

features.name: operator_precedence_clarity
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly mentions operator precedence rules (e.g., 'not' > 'and' > 'or'). 1 indicates the prompt clearly specifies precedence, 0 indicates it does not. This directly affects performance because clarity on precedence reduces errors in evaluation.

features.name: output_concision_requirement
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly requires the assistant to output only 'True' or 'False' with no additional text. 1 indicates such a requirement is present, 0 indicates it is absent. This improves performance by reducing ambiguity and ensuring the model adheres to the required output format.
